title: 皐月賞の後に・賞賛の方向

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What an unexpected—no, what spectacular
development! The winner of this year's Satsuki
Sho is...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ack!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why am I... Why am I here?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why aren't I in the Winner's Circle?! This is the
first race of the Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why can't I achieve what I set out to?! At this
rate, I...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Wow, I can't believe she actually got first place!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
The competition was intense! This certainly is the
Golden Generation!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You know... I'm a bit disappointed. I was hoping
the nepo baby would win.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Her mother's a legend, after all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm fine, besides the fact that I lost.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But don't get the wrong idea. I have no intention
of giving up at this point.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I fell behind this time, but next time I'll get the
praise I deserve.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's when I'll be recognized as a first-rate—no,
as myself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, the next leg of our journey brings us to
the main event of the Classics—the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: We have to win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: King Halo and I return to the academy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: All right, Trainer.... See you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, I thought I saw a familiar face. I'm glad I
didn't mistake you for somebody else.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's pretty late for us to bump into each other like
this. Does that mean...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You're also going for a run right now?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh? "Also"?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Are you saying you're going to run at this hour?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I mean... our next race is the Japanese
Derby, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I promised my moms I would be the top
Umamusume in Japan one day.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's why I always have to do my very best. I
especially felt that during today's race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's so good, but I don't want to let them
take the lead.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm doing it for both my mom who gave birth to
me, and my mom who raised me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm heading off now! See you tomorrow at
school!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Her mother has high expectations for her.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. I'm granting you the right to accompany
me for one more lap.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There's no need to worry.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to give up the lead to anyone else
either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, King Halo pushes her limits and
doesn't stop at just one lap.
